description: Phase 2 - Content & Discovery: Rich blog content (markdown), cover images, blog category filter + pagination, product niche filter, search, and related items
steps: 2.1 Rich blog content with markdown support
2.2 Cover images for blogs and products
acceptance_criteria: Blog content renders markdown (headings, lists, links, quotes, images)
Blog posts can have cover images displayed on listing and detail pages
Products can have images displayed on catalog and detail pages
Blog listing supports category filtering via searchParams
Blog listing supports pagination (6 posts per page)
Product catalog supports niche filtering via searchParams
Blog and product pages have search input filtering by title/content
Blog detail page shows related articles from same category
Product detail page shows other products section
findings: All 6 Phase 2 tasks implemented successfully. Installed 'marked' package for markdown rendering. TypeScript compiles clean (only pre-existing test file errors from missing vitest globals). All 9 passing test suites (62 tests) continue to pass. The same 9 sqlite3-GLIBC failures remain as pre-existing. Made searchParams optional in BlogArchivePage and CatalogPage to maintain test compatibility (tests call without arguments). Blog page now has full search, category filter pills, and pagination (6 per page). Product page has niche filter and search. Blog detail shows related articles from same category. Product detail shows other products.
